commit_scope: Reconcile the lowered JIT vocabulary with Hati/BML tags, prove the residual JIT lowering cluster four-way, and add macOS/Android metal-plane evidence

commands: bash form/scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh jit-lower jit-lower-program full-jit-lower jit-lower-bmf jit-lower-emit
local_validation.notes: Focused validation passes for all five JIT lowering residual bands on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu. The metal-plane audit validates the Form-native JIT lane proof, recursive lowerer proof, oracle-learning proof, the lowered residual cluster, host execution of the lowered guard, and macOS arm64 plus Android arm64 object receipts. Full form validation remains a diagnostic rc=1 because five non-target residual bands still diverge; the floor improved to fourth arm: 104 band(s) four-way, 539 ok, 5 divergent.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The lowered JIT residual cluster no longer collides with Hati/BML tags 44..46. Lowered JIT constructors occupy tags 70..79, fkwu walks and emits those tags, fourth-arm node carrier support roots node fields through arena melt, and the metal-plane audit proves the lowered guard on host plus macOS arm64 and Android arm64 object receipts. The Android JIT floor is Form-native lowered recipes/tables; any APK-shipped compiler binary is optional oracle or acceleration evidence, not the minimum supported path.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form kernel lowering and documentation; no public HTTP endpoint changed

Metal-plane audit proves Form-native JIT lanes and lowered JIT emission before compiling macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF object receipts.
